message:
fix(runtime): bound crash loop detector incident log to prevent unbounded memory growth

crash_loop_detector.rs:
- Add DEFAULT_MAX_INCIDENTS (4096) constant and max_incidents field to
  CrashLoopDetector to cap the incident audit trail
- Add with_incident_capacity() constructor for tests and custom limits
- Add push_incident() helper that appends a new incident and drains
  oldest entries when the capacity is exceeded (sliding window)
- Replace all 6 direct self.incidents.push() calls with push_incident()
  to consistently enforce the bound across all decision paths

New tests:
- incident_capacity_clamps_to_one: verifies capacity floor of 1
- incident_log_evicts_oldest_entries: verifies FIFO eviction under
  capacity pressure and that latest incidents are preserved

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
